info.name: BIM API v2
info.description:
Business In Map — v2 API.
Generated from docs/api/openapi-v2.yaml.

Set {{base_url}} and, after logging in, paste the token into {{token}}. Public endpoints (auth, discovery, posts, jobs) ignore the bearer token.

request.description: Revoke every token for this account
Request a reset code by email (public, no enumeration, throttled 6/min)
Resend the reset code (alias of forgot)
Check a code without consuming it (public)
Set a new password with a valid code (public, revokes all tokens)
May I delete my account, and if not, why not?
Request deletion (soft delete + wallet freeze + revoke all tokens)
Restore an account inside the grace window (public, throttled)
The attributes catalog for a business's own specialty, marked with its current picks
A business sets which attributes describe it (full replace)
Root categories — the app's opening screen (public)
The specialties under a category — these ids are discovery's child_id (public)
Nearest city to a GPS point (public)
Add an address (first one becomes primary)
Delete (promotes newest if it was primary)
Transfer points to another user (PIN-gated, self blocked)
Whether a wallet PIN is set
Set or change the PIN (change needs current_pin)
Start a real-money top-up (returns hosted-checkout payload)
Gateway server-to-server callback (PUBLIC — the gateway calls it)
Add a line (retail or menu offering)
Place the order for a business (cash)
Open a shared (group) cart and get its join token
Join a shared cart by token
Add an attributed line to a shared cart
Host checks out the shared cart (one invoice)
Cancel a pending order (only before the business accepts)
Accept a pending order (settles BIM's service fee from the business wallet)
Mark preparing (becomes visible to delivery drivers)
Reject a pending order (only before acceptance)
Add a variant (setting is_default clears the others)
Activate a boost package on an offer
Create a price for one (service, item type)
Services + allowed item types + charge modes for the create form
Services + allowed item types for the create form
List a catalog product (must be an in-scope active master, once per business)
Search in-scope catalog masters this business hasn't listed yet (picker feed)
Restaurant issues the pickup QR token (stage 1)
Driver issues the delivery QR token (stage 2)
Issue a one-time handover token for a ready order
Confirm handover by scanning the token (flips to completed)
Scan a table's permanent QR to open/join its dine-in cart
Find carriers on a route + day, ranked by trust (public)
The vehicle/cargo classes for the scheduling service (public)
Block capacity for seats sold off the app
Reject a reservation, or release an offline hold
Subscribe/activate a guarantee level (forces fee + rating consent)
Unlock the guarantee back to balance
Check whether the guarantee covers an operation amount
The unified notification center (general + offer matches)
Register the device's push token (user_push_tokens — the single store)
Attribute (option) filters for a category child
Discover businesses — filterable by service/item types and by option_ids[] (all must match) (public)
A business's menu grouped by sections (public)
Browse open jobs — filterable by category_id/category_child_id (public)
Category/specialty tree — only branches with an open job
Platform-wide job counters (public) — the aggregate companion to /jobs/mine/stats
Follow a job field (a whole category or one specialty) for live push
A client applies (once — a repeat is 422)
The posting business stops accepting applications
Full applicant list — the posting business only
The posting business accepts an applicant (idempotent
Escrow deposits this account is a party to
One deposit, if you are a party to it
The reason codes a dispute may be opened with
Disputes this account is a party to
One dispute, if you are a party to it
Open a dispute on a booking
Declare that you are engaging with the settlement
Agree to delete a finished dispute's conversation
Mark the dispute as settled between the parties
The off-app settlement proposals on this dispute
Propose an amount settled outside the platform
Ask for an arbitrator without waiting out the settlement window
The conduct rules, and whether you have accepted them
Post a message into the dispute's room
Contest a fine while its window is open
The feed — public, and audience-scoped when a bearer token is sent
Top-level comments, filtered to what the reader may see
Delete a comment (its author, or the post's author moderating)
My own posts, active or not
What this account can link a post to
Delete own post and its stored files
